    LINEAR - Enum constant in enum class com.blackrook.gloop.opengl.enums.TextureMagFilter
    Linear magnification - color using linear interpolation ("smoothes" textures).
    LINEAR - Enum constant in enum class com.blackrook.gloop.opengl.enums.TextureMinFilter
    Linear minification - color using cluster average (okay approximation).
